texto: Those who have dissected or inspected many [bodies] have at least learnt to doubt
autor: while others who are ignorant of anatomy and do not take the trouble to attend it are in no doubt at all.
explicacao: Citação de while others who are ignorant of anatomy and do not take the trouble to attend it are in no doubt at all. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Those who have dissected or inspected many [bodies] have at least learnt to doubt” articula reflexao, giovanni-battista-morgagni, those em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
